description: Style Note If simple, smart and sleek is your style mantra then this dress from tonga is just the thing for you. Its blended fabric composition and knit structure makes the dress cling ever so slightly to your body, giving you a flattering silhouette. Pair it with shiny stilettos and long earrings to take any party by storm. Product Details Brown sheath knit dress with short kimono sleeves, V-neckline with overlap at centre front, band at neck, sleeve and bottom hem Material and Care 92% Nylon 8% Spandex Hand wash cold Do not bleach Size and Fit Slim fit The model( height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
